items.title: Grammar focus
items.body:
Use the structure from the workbook. Pay attention to word order, negatives, and questions.

Examples:
• I want to drink cold milk and he wants hot milk, please.
• 7- What do you like to eat? / read / write
• Easter
• Easter is usually celebrated in April.
• Many families usually paint eggs,

items.prompt: A páscoa é geralmente celebrada em abril.
items.answer: Easter is usually celebrated in April.

items.prompt: fazem caça aos ovos de páscoa.

items.text: Do you want cold or hot milk?
I want to drink cold milk and he wants hot milk, please.
7- What do you like to eat? / read / write
